# Neofolio — permissive by design.
# This site is built to be read by humans AND AI systems. Both are welcome.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# AI / training crawlers — explicitly allowed. If you fork Neofolio and want
# to opt OUT of AI training, change these `Allow` lines to `Disallow: /`.
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

# Sitemap is auto-generated by @astrojs/sitemap on every build.
# Update the absolute URL by editing src/config.ts > SITE.url.
Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap-index.xml
